options.label: A
options.choiceText: Join the fray! These insults will not go unanswered!

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Do your best to stop the fighting. This is a respectable establishment.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Pay for the thing. You never know.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Refuse to pay. Never trust a Vermling.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Pay for the thing. You never know.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Refuse to pay. Never trust a Vermling.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Find a cat? You have more important things to do.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Reassure the boy and go find the cat.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Go help lay the foundation.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Take the opportunity to steal some valuables in the area while people are distracted.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Go aid in the defense of the city.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: If the guards are distracted by an attacking force, now would be the perfect time to steal some valuables.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Help the captain load his ship.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Move on with your business. You don't have the time or inclination for such things.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: The map does look valuable. Decide to bargain for it.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Refuse to deal with the merchant.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Sell the goods.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Donate the goods to the city.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Play a game with the man. It may prove to be a good time.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Refuse the game of dice.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Make a deal with the Harrower.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Shake your head and walk away. Best not to take chances in such situations.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Yield to the pie and admit defeat.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Power through the pain. You will not be bested!

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Stop and try the food.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Continue on your way to a less adventurous meal.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Raise arms and fight the Lurkers back into the sea.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Approach the Lurkers cautiously and attempt to communicate with them.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Do your best to explain that the man was like this when you found him.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Panic and kill the guard, then dispose of both corpses.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Intervene on the boy's behalf.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Let the guards haul the boy away to prison.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Demand a different payment. The single coin is an insult.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Accept the strange coin and research it for hidden value.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Decline to help the old woman.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Agree to help with the rat infestation.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Attend the wedding with an expensive gift.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Attend the wedding and bring a mundane gift.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Agree to guard the goods. It should be easy money.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Politely decline. You have much better things to do tonight.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Demand payment up front before agreeing to look for the man's brother.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Agree to help the man in his search.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Further investigate the exchange between the men.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Leave the criminal element alone and continue enjoying the show.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Give chase. Thieves must be brought to justice.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: The thief had the right idea. Grab some vegetables for yourself.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Join the expedition as a guard.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Join the expedition as a logger.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Attempt to catch the vase.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: With no time to react, watch the vase fall to the ground.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Offer to fix the lamps. It shouldn't be too hard with a bit of technical know-how.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Take the opportunity to steal some valuables from drunk patrons in the dark.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Attempt to stop the crowd from hanging the Vermling.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Take no action and see this through to its logical conclusion.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Accept the mysterious job. You can handle anything.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Incredulously explain she must have the wrong people and you won't take the job.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Talk to the Savvas, appealing to their sense of duty and community.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Talk to the managers and attempt to get the Savvas better pay.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Give chase! No one steals from you and gets away with it.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Take a clear shot at him with a bow before he disappears into the grating.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Leave with the woman to help her find her missing daughter.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Refuse to help the woman and go back to gambling.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Agree to help the city guard.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Decline to help and instead sell this information to interested parties.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Run to the girl and attempt to pull her out of the Void.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Watch what happens with morbid curiosity.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Follow the man in an attempt to discover the Ravens' lair.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Confront him on the spot and turn him over to the authorities.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Point the way to the Sinking Market - the only place that would deal with them.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Escort the Harrowers to the New Market and help them find a spice merchant.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Join the fray! These insults will not go unanswered!

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Do your best to stop the fighting. This is a respectable establishment.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Attempt to console and cheer up those affected by the attack.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Help repair the gate. You wouldn't want another attack to further cripple the town.

outcomes.condition: Postava: three-spears / spellweaver / tinkerer / triangles / circles

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Intervene on the Orchid's behalf.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Watch the fight with the crowd.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Agree to help the priest and accompany him to the sanctuary.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Refuse to help, making some excuse about being too busy.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Rush to the aid of the residents and help put out the fire.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Pursue the hooded figure and make him answer for this attack.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Barter with the Vermling for the potion.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Move along. You don't need any more potions.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Agree to help the presumptuous kid.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Tell this kid that he must have the wrong group of adventurers.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Oblige the Tinkerer and send along the contraption.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: You don't want to pay for postage. Just keep the thing for yourself.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Offer to help the blacksmith yourself.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Direct him to the Savvas Elemental Guild and go back to sleep.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Cooperate with the guard and tell him everything you know.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Be as vague and unhelpful as possible, giving no useful information.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Have a drink with the Cragheart.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Encourage the Cragheart to move on with its life.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Intervene with the guards and find out what is going on.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Let the guards continue their business and just continue with yours.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Begrudgingly pay for the note.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Refuse to pay for the note.

options.choiceText: Agree to help him make contact with the military.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Demand a finder's fee for setting him up with buyers.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Attack the beast from the wall, shooting arrows at it until it stops moving.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Work on reinforcing the walls. Hold it off for as long as possible.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Tell the guard that the sword belongs to the Nightshroud, your former party member.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Lie and claim you know nothing.

options.choiceText: Calmly explain the situation to the Plagueherald, imploring it to move on.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Threaten the Plagueherald with retribution if it doesn't stop attacking residents.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Let the guards know you recognize the Berserker's axe.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Stay silent and keep out of it.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Go to the show and cheer on the Soothsinger.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Seems like a good opportunity to pick some pockets while people are distracted.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Vouch for the Orchids.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Advise against trading with the Orchids.

options.choiceText: Tell him that joining the sanctuary is the right thing to do.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Tell him to follow his dreams.

options.choiceText: Pay for the note.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Refuse to pay for the note.

options.choiceText: Join the crowd in laughing at the man.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Calm down the crowd and get more details from the man about the attack.

options.choiceText: Help to dispose of the corpses as quickly as possible.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Investigate the corpses.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Attempt to stop the men from burning down the shop.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Take part in the looting and burning of the store.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Gratefully keep the spider.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: You can't decide who should keep it, so sell the spider and split the money.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Have a drink and reminisce about old times.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Overpower the Scoundrel and deliver her to the city guards.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Agree to help.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Tell the captain to fix his own problem.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Stay and listen to what the Nightshroud has to say.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Claim you want nothing to do with this and walk away.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Raid the warehouse and recover the stolen goods.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Wait until the thieves return so you can apprehend them.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Offer to pay off the Sawbones' debt.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Get the Sawbones on a boat across the Misty Sea. New adventures surely await there.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Pay off the thugs.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Refuse to pay. You won't be strong-armed by anyone.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Find some way to get the water to stop gushing.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Get the staff out of your room and throw it into the bay.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Embrace the joke and go with it.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Leave the bar before someone recognizes you.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Talk to some merchants about revitalizing the area.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Regretfully explain that you don't have the power to effect change like this.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Let the sphere go.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Jump into the river and continue to follow the sphere's pull.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Follow the smelly old bandit.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Refuse to go with the man. This whole situation seems...fishy.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Seek help from the University.

options.label: B

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Go watch the dancing bear.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Visit the famed fortune-teller.

options.choiceText: Lie and say that you are still working on it.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Tell the Captain you decided not to kill the Elder Drake.

options.choiceText: Accept the drink.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Decline the suspicious offer and continue your business.

options.choiceText: Do the job.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Claim you've changed your ways and grave robbing is a step too far.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Accept the man's deal.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Demand payment for the job up-front.

options.choiceText: Intervene on the man's behalf.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Keep walking.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Attempt to calm down the guards and explain the situation.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: These guards are not interested in a friendly discourse. Prepare to defend yourself.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Take the time to relate the story of what happened.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Claim it wasn't you and leave quickly.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Run from the howling to safety.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Let the wolves come.

options.choiceText: Eat the berries.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Pass by the berries and just eat your normal rations.

options.choiceText: Eat the berries.

options.choiceText: Pass by the berries and just eat your normal rations.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Approach the caravan and offer to travel with them until your paths diverge.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Attack the caravan.

options.choiceText: Help the Inox fight off the humans.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Help the humans fight off the Inox.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Take the opportunity to run from the bear before it gets any closer.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Attack the bear, hopefully catching it by surprise.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Head into the forest to investigate the chanting.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Keep moving on down the road. No need to get mixed up in whatever is going on.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Pay the thieves.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Resist the robbery, killing as many thieves as you can.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Help out the guard.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Claim you have no aid to give and move on.

options.choiceText: Use weights and ropes to climb out of the hole as quickly as possible.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Explore the area.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Try to find a clearing where you can avoid the falling rocks.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Take cover under a nearby outcropping and wait out the earthquake.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Leave the puppy to fend for itself.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Take the puppy and bring it back to Gloomhaven.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Defend yourself with lethal force.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Attempt to calm down the hermit and resolve the situation peacefully.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Shoot at the birds.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Let the birds pass undisturbed.

options.choiceText: Shoot at the birds.

options.choiceText: Let the birds pass undisturbed.

options.choiceText: Shoot at one of the deer.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Just watch the deer for a little bit.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Do whatever the Quatryl says.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Demand an explanation before you help in any way.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Attempt to come to a peaceful resolution.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Attack the insulting, contemptuous Inox.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Help the guards catch the escaping man.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Interfere with the guards to help the man escape.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: The song must serve some nefarious purpose. Attack the Vermlings.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Move closer and enjoy the music.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Keep moving forward.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Follow the animals' cue and run in the opposite direction.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Help push out the Quatryl ringmaster's wagon.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Help push out the fortune-teller's wagon.

options.choiceText: Bring the man some leaves.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Grab his stuff and run off while he's indisposed.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Aid the Inox with what they are carrying.

options.choiceText: Ignore the Shaman's ramblings.

options.choiceText: Try to reason with the Inox.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Fight off the Inox. They'll get no payments from you.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Attempt to help the man with his axle problem.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Tie up the man and take all of the goods he is so concerned about.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Clear the trees from the road. It is the best way through and will help other travelers.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Take the time to find a way around the trees.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Sell the man a stamina potion.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Politely decline and move quickly on your way.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Attempt to clear the stones from the path.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Backtrack and find a way around the stone-filled valley.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Help the survivors deal with the carnage.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Finish the job the Vermlings started and loot whatever is left.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Charge into the fray to protect the caravan from the savage attack.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Watch for a while and wait for an opportune moment to strike.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Give the Valraths a portion of your supplies.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: You spent good money on these supplies. Refuse to help.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Investigate further. Whatever forces are at work must be put in check.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Get out of this place as quickly as you can.

options.choiceText: Quickly put out the fire and sneak out into the brush to get a look.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Wait by the fire for whatever comes.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Fight off the men. This is highway robbery, whatever the motive.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Pay the men and be on your way.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Continue down the path into the wood. You are not afraid.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Find another way to your destination.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Brave the storm and continue on your way. It's not that bad.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Wait out the storm under the outcropping.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Head off into the forest to find out what happened.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Move on. That forest does not look friendly.

options.choiceText: Help the poor Valrath.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: This is clearly some sort of plague. Avoid it at all costs.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Ford the river where you are. It is not ideal, but it should be possible.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Head downriver and find a better place to cross.

options.choiceText: Attempt to calm the bear and back away slowly.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Arm yourself and fight off the bear.

options.choiceText: Agree to travel with the Brute for a little while. So what if it's in the wrong direction?

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Regretfully leave the Brute to his duties and continue on your way.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Take the core with you.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Leave the core alone. You don't want anything weighing you down in battle.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Renew your efforts to slay the demons.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Use the distraction to disengage from the demons and run away.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Attack. Friend or not, those who prey on the weak should be brought to justice.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Let the bandits go.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Take the risk to climb the ridge and investigate the rocks.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Forget about the rocks and continue on your journey.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Move on, leaving the strange Vermling in peace.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Kill the savage little beast.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Give them whatever information you can on the Sunkeeper's whereabouts.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Attack the demons. There are a lot of them, but you do not take kindly to threats.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Claim allegiance to the military.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Claim allegiance to the merchant guilds.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Take the staff and move on.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Investigate the area and get to the bottom of this.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Investigate further.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Arm yourself and make a defensive retreat from the area.

options.choiceText: Leave the corpses alone.

options.choiceText: Help the Berserker fight off the guards.

options.label: B

options.choiceText: Take the time to escort the troupe back out of the forest.

options.choiceText: Take the clear path.

options.label: B

options.choiceText: Help the wounded man as best you can.

options.choiceText: Accept the gift of the Savvas.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Downplay your struggle and politely decline the Savvas's offer.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Follow the wolf.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Find your own way through the forest.

options.choiceText: Cover yourself as best you can and try to walk through the swarm.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Use whatever you can to burn a path through the swarm.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Respectfully bury the dead and mourn their loss.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Take what you can find and move on.

options.label: A
options.choiceText: Leave the scene quietly and return to your own business.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Attack the demons and free the Sunkeeper.

options.choiceText: Agree to help the Sun Demons.

options.choiceText: Thank the Savvas for his timely assistance.

options.choiceText: Investigate further.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Arm yourself and make a defensive retreat from the area.

options.choiceText: Take the chain for yourself and don't tell the brother.

options.choiceText: Take cover.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Attack the Inox.

options.choiceText: Demonstrate your virtue by offering to escort the merchant back to Gloomhaven.

options.label: B
options.choiceText: Demonstrate your lack of virtue by robbing the merchant.

options.choiceText: Take what you want and move on.

options.choiceText: Calm the merchant and explain that not all mercenaries are bloodthirsty thieves.

options.choiceText: Chase them down quickly and kill them.

options.choiceText: Follow them more slowly, attempting to discover where they came from.
